headline: Tractor Supply Customers Show Their Passion for Shelter Pets During "Relief for Rescues" Fundraiser
summary: BRENTWOOD, Tenn., June 17, 2026--Tractor Supply customers donated over $547K to the Relief for Rescues Fund with MuttNation, aiding animal shelters hit by natural disasters.
